title: THE FLESH THAT GROWS
description:
A Horror-Tech modpack with a large focus on FLESH and MEAT
will you survive?
body:
_**FAIR WARNING to anybody that wishes to play this, this is not a finished modpack, it is in development. I am the primary developer and this was meant to be played on SINGLEPLAYER in NORMAL DIFFICULTY. i was thankfully blessed with friends helping to playtest from time to time. If i make any mistakes, contact my github.**_



**<center> This world is hell, I might be the last but atleast i can make the most of it ...right?**

![THE FLESH THAT GROWS logo image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3507d10b4f72521d921c699d66f508ad56a0b34c.png)





  This is a semi-large modern version modpack originally inspired SCPWIKI stories like "When Day Breaks" and fleshy meaty mods. This Modpack was originally made for a group of friends, but i decided to go fully into the development, in order to see what its like making a "proper" modpack. This modpack is hard, but will give you the tools neccessary to fight off any threats along the way, you will die. You will die, alot. 
  
  <b> -Certain vanilla+ textures courtesy of <b/> [VANILLATWEAKS](https://vanillatweaks.net)
  
  <b> -Gun Framework dependancy mod courtesy of <b/> [MRCRAYFISH](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
  
  <b> -Zombie and Skeleton retextures courtest of <b/> [MRBLUEYETI](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mrblueyeti/projects)
</center>
